result:
Row review complete. Here's a summary of the candidate annotations:

**13 row-level flags across 41 transactions:**

| Rows | Customer/Vendor | Issue | Controls | Status |
|------|----------------|-------|----------|--------|
| 8 | New Wave | Exempt marketing bill ($3,452), no support | CHK-015 | Needs More Context |
| 9 | EpikFliks | Exempt COGS bill, possible subcontractor | CHK-015, CHK-016 | Needs More Context |
| 11 | Emily G | Exempt freelancer bill ($6,351) | CHK-015, CHK-016 | Needs More Context |
| 12 | Justine A | Exempt freelancer bill ($1,500) | CHK-015, CHK-016 | Needs More Context |
| 13-14 | Alphabet | Exempt revenue (invoice + credit memo) while other invoices carry tax | CHK-005 | Review Needed |
| 17-18 | Amazon | GST in Dec vs HST ON in Apr-May, $200K+ | CHK-007, CHK-005 | Review Needed |
| 19-21 | Alphabet | Same project (ALP202307) switches from HST ON to GST, $150K | CHK-007, CHK-005 | Review Needed |
| 36 | Virtual Assistants | Vendor bill on Salaries account | CHK-013 | Review Needed |
| 38 | That Planted Fork | Restaurant-name vendor on Marketing with full ITC | CHK-018 | Review Needed |

**2 pattern annotations:** Alphabet and Amazon mixed-treatment clusters (CHK-007).

**1 observation:** M&E tax code configuration note (6.5% rate = 50% ITC restriction built in).

28 of 41 rows passed without flags. The unflagged rows had consistent, well-supported tax treatments.
